Container.Name: opencode-desktop
Container.Overview:
OpenCode Desktop running in a browser-accessible Linux desktop via KasmVNC. OpenCode is an open-source AI coding agent. This container provides the Desktop app streamed to your browser, with persistent config and project workspace support.
Access the web UI at port 3000. Create project folders in the Workspace path and initialise OpenCode inside each one.
Optional: mount your host Docker socket to let OpenCode run Docker commands. Optional: add /dev/dri for Intel/AMD GPU acceleration if available.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Persistent storage for OpenCode config, auth, cache, plugins, and desktop settings

Config.Name: Workspace
Config.Description: Your code projects workspace. Create subfolders per project here.

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Optional: Host Docker socket so OpenCode can run Docker commands

Config.Name: Password
Config.Description: Optional: Password for the KasmVNC web UI. Leave blank for no auth.

Config.Name: Extra Packages
Config.Description: Optional: space-separated APT packages to install at container startup (e.g. golang-go ruby rustc cargo)

Config.Name: GPU
Config.Description: Optional: Intel/AMD GPU for DRI3 acceleration. Set to /dev/dri if available on your host. Remove if not needed.
